channel.title: Openai on Archive 03
channel.description: Recent content in Openai on Archive 03

item.title: Microsoft Outlook: Is OpenAI Dependency a Weakness?
item.description: Microsoft ($MSFT) stands at the center of the AI era thanks to OpenAI and Azure, but faces risks from massive CAPEX and partner concentration. We examine both growth and risks.

item.title: Is There a Way to Buy Private OpenAI? A Deep Dive into DXYZ
item.description: Why are individual investors always locked out of the hottest unicorn companies just before they go public? We analyze DXYZ, a closed-end fund created to bridge this gap. Discover the optimal portfolio strategy between the allure of private innovators like SpaceX and OpenAI and the fund’s fatal risks.
